summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JNV Editorial Club website. All core functionality working perfectly including bilingual content submission, admin approval workflow, and public browsing.

design_issues.issue: Span elements inside select/option tags causing dev warnings

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity and all 21 endpoints (100% success rate)
Student submission form with bilingual English/Hindi content
Category selection (poem, story, essay, article) and language selection
Admin dashboard with stats display (total, approved, pending, rejected)
Public browse page with category and language filters
Individual work detail page with bilingual content display
Font implementation (Syne for headings, Space Grotesk for body, Rozha One for Hindi)
Neo-brutalist design with proper borders, shadows, and color scheme
Navigation between all pages (Home, Browse, Submit, Admin)
Responsive design elements and proper UI interactions
